initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%';

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, e.cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%';

SELECT m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name, e.cost
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_description LIKE '%water%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%veggie tray%'
   OR e.expense_description LIKE '%supplies%';
